name: Rapid Quick Attack
effect_4pc: Each time Quick Spike is used, increases Quick Spike by 5%, up to 5 stacks.

name: Sharp Sense
effect_4pc: Increases Awareness by 15%; When Quick Spike is Critical, increases Strength by 10%.

name: Power Vibe
effect_4pc: Increases Awareness by 15%; When Power Spike is Critical, increases Strength by 10%.

name: Power Rise
effect_4pc: Increases Attack Technique by 10% when using Power Spike; When scoring with Power Spike, recovers 5 Stamina.

name: Precise Serve
effect_4pc: Serves never fail and increases Attack Technique by 15% when serving.

name: Precise Set
effect_4pc: Increases setting power by 15% of the Set stat.

name: Precise Block
effect_4pc: When blocking a Power Spike, increases this block's power by 20% of Block stat.

name: Block Movement
effect_4pc: When blocking a spike with other Block-type players present in the front row, increases this block's power by 20% of Block stat.

name: Assist Receive
effect_4pc: When achieving a PERFECT receive, increases your side's next spike power by 30% of spiker's Power/Quick Attack stat.

name: Supreme Receive
effect_4pc: When receiving a Quick Spike, increases this reception's power by 30% of the Receive stat.

name: Morale Surge
effect_4pc: When spiking, increase your Team Morale by 5 points; while your side is in [Team Morale Awakening], increases players' Awareness by 10% and Strength by 20%.

name: Awareness Enhancement
effect_4pc: Increases Awareness by 22.5%; each Critical play reduces Awareness by 10% and increases Quick ATK stat by 5%, up to 3 stacks.

name: Setter Dump
effect_4pc: Increases Awareness by 10%; when casting Setter Dump skills, increases Strength by 30%.

name: Status Enhancement
effect_4pc: When Stamina is below 70 points, increases Awareness by 10%; when recovering Stamina, increases Strength by 10%, up to 3 stacks.

name: Forceful Guard
effect_4pc: Increases Spirit by 15%; when achieving Critical Receive or Critical Block, increases next skill's power by 20% of the corresponding stat.
